message:
test(airtable): add comprehensive unit tests for error and types modules

Additive test coverage for the Airtable connector:

- error.rs (+418 lines): Display messages for all AirtableError variants,
  FcpError conversions, error source chains, retryable classification,
  status code mappings, rate limit detection

- types.rs (+266 lines): AirtableRecord serde roundtrips, field type
  parsing, pagination token handling, base/table ID validation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
